title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team has completed a review of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- A user was banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within a 20-minute window. This constitutes a clear and immediate safety threat to the community.
- A second user was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- One new member received a warning for an off-topic post in #introductions and has been directed to the channel guidelines.
- One account received a warning for repeated near-identical replies in help channels that raised automation concerns.

**Reports closed without action (2)**
- A medium-severity dispute report against a trusted community helper was reviewed and closed. A single accusation during a moderation disagreement does not meet the threshold for sanction.
- A high-severity report against a core maintainer was reviewed and determined to be a false positive resulting from a coordinated mass-report by brigading users following a legitimate moderation decision. No action was taken.

All 6 open reports have been resolved. If you have concerns about community conduct, please use the report system. Thank you for helping keep this space safe.
